decisions.rationale: IR re-read (bTHDg____root.json) confirms bTHDf siblings ai_RNbBKLUn, ai_RNbBKLUo, and ai_RNbBHYGq should be full-width header above a sidebar+main row. DashboardLayout still nests Header in the right column for shadcn SidebarProvider + mobile SidebarTrigger — same structural gap deferred at SHELL-05 C-1, SHELL-06 C-1, and SHELL-07 C-1. SHELL-08 scope requires mounting page-instance bubble ids and paths-main boundary, not layout restructure; all four named ui_refs pass ui_evidence and AC-1/AC-2/AC-3 pass. Downstream PATHS-01 (MOD-DRSAM-PATHS) depends_on SHELL-08 for the ai_RNbBHYGq content slot and ownership marker, not full-width header span. Reconcile layout in a shell layout polish pass when SHELL-09+ page shells batch consistent chrome structure.

Brownfield retention of prototype path-card grid inside ai_RNbBHYGq is intentional and satisfies SHELL-08 AC-3: the content slot is bounded by data-bubble-id ai_RNbBHYGq with data-module-owner MOD-DRSAM-PATHS, and path_page_tab_os_ tab UI is correctly deferred. Decompose scope assigns path tabs, enrollment UI, and paths-main IR subtree to MOD-DRSAM-PATHS (PATHS-01+). Coverage preflight already records prototype widget retention. Replacing with a minimal placeholder would regress working brownfield UI without blocking downstream gates.

PATHS_ROUTE in frontend/src/lib/paths/routes.ts is not yet imported by authenticatedRoutes.tsx, which hardcodes '/paths'. Routing works correctly (AC-1 pass, FV-1 pass); this is single-source-of-truth hygiene only, analogous to SHELL-06 C-3 (DASHBOARD_ROUTE import) and SHELL-07 C-3 (JOURNAL_ROUTE import) deferred as routing polish. No downstream depends_on gate requires the constant import before advance. Consolidate when touching shell routing for SHELL-09+ page routes.

summary: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, no blockers, all ACs and ui_evidence pass. Deferred: C-1 full-width header sibling layout vs shadcn column nesting (inherited SHELL-05 gap, shell layout polish); C-3 PATHS_ROUTE import DRY (routing hygiene, batch with SHELL-09+). Accepted: C-2 brownfield prototype path cards inside ai_RNbBHYGq with MOD-DRSAM-PATHS ownership marker per scope boundary.
